summary: Iteration 24 - Frontend Testing Complete. Verified FDE Dashboard, Counsellor Dashboard, and AI-Powered Business Insights on /insights page. All three features are working correctly with proper layouts, spacing, and AI-generated content.

issues: Dashboard takes ~15 seconds to fully load due to multiple API calls and AI insights generation. Consider adding skeleton loaders or optimizing API calls.

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Received NaN for the `children` attribute' appears during page renders - minor but should be investigated

context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard redesigns verified. FDE and Counsellor dashboards have clean layouts with proper spacing. AI insights page uses real GPT-4o analysis showing Health Score, What's Going Well, and Needs Attention sections. The AI API endpoint /api/analytics/ai-branch-insights is working and generates actionable business insights.
